title: Help Center
openManualFailed: Could not open the user manual. See the docs on GitHub instead.

welcome.title: Welcome to MetaMates
welcome.description: Built for creators, knowledge workers, and lifelong learners: **the thinking engine on the right is the main entry**—chat or run a command, AI reads your inspiration vault and writes plans and insights back to notes, not lost in chat.

gettingStarted.title: Getting Started
gettingStarted.step1Desc: Choose a local folder on the left—fragments, diary, clips live here; you own the data
gettingStarted.step2Desc: Pick an AI in the right panel and say what you want—no long note required first
gettingStarted.step3Desc: Plans, reviews, and upgraded notes land in files; open them in the center editor to tweak
gettingStarted.step4Desc: Try `/today` for a daily plan, or `/graduate` to promote an inbox spark to a permanent note

editor.title: Editor Features
editor.realtimeRenderDesc: Markdown formats render instantly, what you see is what you get
editor.wikiLinkDesc: Type [[ to create links, click to navigate
editor.tagsDesc: Type # to add tags for categorization
editor.autoSaveDesc: Changes are saved automatically to file

features.title: More Features
features.fileTree: File Tree - Drag & drop, right-click menu
features.search: Ctrl+P command palette, Ctrl+Shift+F global search, Ctrl+Shift+P today's PLAN
features.ai: Thinking engine — 15 methodology slash commands; results write back to your vault; long-term memory syncs to your Memory Index note
features.memory: User memory — AI assistants mirror summaries into the Memory Index inside your vault for future sessions
features.calendar: Diary calendar — click a date to open or create diary & PLAN

shortcuts.title: Shortcuts
shortcuts.editorNote: In the editor: Ctrl+B bold, Ctrl+I italic, Ctrl+K wiki link

update.devMode: Auto-update is disabled in dev mode — download from GitHub Releases
update.errorGeneric: Update check failed — try again or download from GitHub Releases
